summary: Full testing of Variant Action Buttons feature completed. All 8 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend UI tests confirm unauthenticated state shows 'Sign in to add this variant' with Sign In button, authenticated non-owner state shows Add to Wishlist/Actively Seeking/Add to Collection buttons, and authenticated owner state shows Trade/Sell buttons. Sell button navigates to /honeypot with form pre-filled from Discogs metadata.
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: GET /api/vinyl/ownership/30984958 without auth returns {owned: false, iso_status: null, record_id: null, iso_id: null}
PASS: GET /api/vinyl/ownership/99999999 returns {owned: false} without error for nonexistent release
PASS: GET /api/vinyl/ownership/{discogs_id} with auth returns correct ownership status based on user's records/ISO items
PASS: POST /api/iso with status='WISHLIST' creates wishlist item, ownership shows iso_status='WISHLIST'
PASS: POST /api/iso with status='OPEN' creates actively seeking item, ownership shows iso_status='OPEN'
PASS: POST /api/records creates collection record, ownership shows owned=true with record_id
PASS: When user has both record and ISO for same discogs_id, ownership returns both record_id and iso_id
PASS: Frontend /vinyl/charli-xcx/brat/black-translucent shows 'Sign in to add this variant' with Sign In button when unauthenticated (data-testid='variant-actions-login')

PASS: Frontend shows action buttons for authenticated non-owner: Add to Wishlist (data-testid='action-wishlist'), Actively Seeking (data-testid='action-iso'), Add to Collection (data-testid='action-add-collection')
PASS: After clicking 'Add to Collection', toast shows 'Brat added to your collection!' and buttons switch to Trade/Sell
PASS: Trade (data-testid='action-trade') and Sell (data-testid='action-sell') buttons appear for owned variants
PASS: Sell button navigates to /honeypot with form pre-filled (artist, album, discogs_id, cover_url, year from variant data)
test_credentials: Created test user testactions@test.com / Test123! for authenticated tests. Registration works without invite code.
seed_data_creation: Test users with TEST_ prefix created during pytest runs are cleaned up after each test class
context_for_next_testing_agent: Variant Action Buttons feature fully tested. Backend endpoint /api/vinyl/ownership/{discogs_id} checks records and iso_items collections by user_id + discogs_id. Returns owned, iso_status, record_id, iso_id. Frontend VariantActions.js component uses ownership state to conditionally render buttons: non-owner sees Wishlist/ISO/Collection buttons, owner sees Trade/Sell buttons. Actions use existing POST /api/records and POST /api/iso endpoints. Sell/Trade navigate to /honeypot with query params that pre-fill the listing form. Test variant: Charli XCX Brat Black Translucent [discogs_id: 30984958]. Existing owner: @katieintheafterglow.

verified: Returns ownership based on user's records/iso_items
Text: 'Sign in to add this variant to your collection'
Form pre-filled with Brat, Charli XCX, cover art
